ops.new_code:
"""CPU demo equivalent for task_000040."""
from __future__ import annotations

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

HIDDEN_SIZE = 768
INTERMEDIATE_SIZE = 3072
LN_EPS = 1e-05
DTYPE_NAME = "float32"

def _compute_dtype() -> torch.dtype:
    return getattr(torch, DTYPE_NAME)

def model_forward(
    x: torch.Tensor,
    ln_w: torch.Tensor,
    ln_b: torch.Tensor,
    w1: torch.Tensor,
    b1: torch.Tensor,
    w2: torch.Tensor,
    b2: torch.Tensor,
) -> torch.Tensor:
    dtype = _compute_dtype()
    x = x.to(dtype)
    ln_w = ln_w.to(dtype)
    ln_b = ln_b.to(dtype)
    w1 = w1.to(dtype)
    b1 = b1.to(dtype)
    w2 = w2.to(dtype)
    b2 = b2.to(dtype)
    B, S, H = x.shape
    assert H == HIDDEN_SIZE
    h = F.layer_norm(x, (HIDDEN_SIZE,), weight=ln_w, bias=ln_b, eps=LN_EPS)
    h = F.linear(h, w1, b1)
    assert h.shape[-1] == INTERMEDIATE_SIZE
    h = F.gelu(h, approximate="tanh")
    h = F.linear(h, w2, b2)
    return h.to(dtype)
ops.reason: CPU demo (no Triton): torch-only equivalent for Windows pipeline verification.
